steps.title: Use slope as the rate
steps.content: The question asks for the predicted increase in total fat for every $1$ gram increase in total protein. That is the slope of the line of best fit.

steps.title: Fit two points from the line
steps.content: Two approximate points on the line are $(20,34)$ and $(30,48)$. Using those points gives the slope directly.

steps.title: Compute and compare
steps.content: $$m=\frac{48-34}{30-20}=\frac{14}{10}=1.4$$ The closest answer choice to $1.4$ is $1.5$, so choice C is correct.
